## Meeting Purpose

[Reschedule the weekly sync due to an urgent conflict.](https://fathom.video/share/M7CYE4zYgyDJQsPPA2y8d3w_JcYG7Djb?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Meeting Rescheduled:** The sync is moved to **Oct 24, 2025, at 2 PM PST** at Ambient's request.](https://fathom.video/share/M7CYE4zYgyDJQsPPA2y8d3w_JcYG7Djb?tab=summary&timestamp=266.0)
  - [**Reason:** Ambient is scrambling to prepare for an urgent, upcoming announcement.](https://fathom.video/share/M7CYE4zYgyDJQsPPA2y8d3w_JcYG7Djb?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)
  - [**Action Items:** GrowthX will send an async executive summary; Mara will fix Mariana's access to the "Adventurers" and "Vallarta" groups in Scrunch.](https://fathom.video/share/M7CYE4zYgyDJQsPPA2y8d3w_JcYG7Djb?tab=summary&timestamp=257.0)

## Topics

### Meeting Reschedule

  - [Mau Barra (Ambient) joined to request a reschedule, citing an urgent, upcoming announcement that requires the team's full attention.](https://fathom.video/share/M7CYE4zYgyDJQsPPA2y8d3w_JcYG7Djb?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)
  - [Alberto (Ambient) proposed the new time: **Oct 24, 2025, at 2 PM PST**.](https://fathom.video/share/M7CYE4zYgyDJQsPPA2y8d3w_JcYG7Djb?tab=summary&timestamp=266.0)
  - [Mara Leighton (GrowthX) confirmed availability and will update the calendar invite.](https://fathom.video/share/M7CYE4zYgyDJQsPPA2y8d3w_JcYG7Djb?tab=summary&timestamp=266.0)

### Scrunch Access Issue

  - [Mariana Montezzana (GrowthX) reported a persistent access issue in Scrunch.](https://fathom.video/share/M7CYE4zYgyDJQsPPA2y8d3w_JcYG7Djb?tab=summary&timestamp=50.0)
  - [**Problem:** Cannot view the "Adventurers" or "Vallarta" groups, despite receiving an invite.](https://fathom.video/share/M7CYE4zYgyDJQsPPA2y8d3w_JcYG7Djb?tab=summary&timestamp=50.0)
  - [**Context:** The issue was previously reported but remains unresolved.](https://fathom.video/share/M7CYE4zYgyDJQsPPA2y8d3w_JcYG7Djb?tab=summary&timestamp=68.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Mara Leighton (GrowthX):**](https://fathom.video/share/M7CYE4zYgyDJQsPPA2y8d3w_JcYG7Djb?tab=summary&timestamp=257.0)
      - [Send an async executive summary to the Ambient team.](https://fathom.video/share/M7CYE4zYgyDJQsPPA2y8d3w_JcYG7Djb?tab=summary&timestamp=257.0)
      - [Update the calendar invite for the new meeting time.](https://fathom.video/share/M7CYE4zYgyDJQsPPA2y8d3w_JcYG7Djb?tab=summary&timestamp=282.0)
      - [Resolve Mariana's access issue for the "Adventurers" and "Vallarta" groups in Scrunch.](https://fathom.video/share/M7CYE4zYgyDJQsPPA2y8d3w_JcYG7Djb?tab=summary&timestamp=50.0)
  - [**All Participants:**](https://fathom.video/share/M7CYE4zYgyDJQsPPA2y8d3w_JcYG7Djb?tab=summary&timestamp=266.0)
      - [Attend the rescheduled sync on **Oct 24, 2025, at 2 PM PST**.](https://fathom.video/share/M7CYE4zYgyDJQsPPA2y8d3w_JcYG7Djb?tab=summary&timestamp=266.0)
